creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of shells/pdksh

diff -urN shells/pdksh/pkg/DESCR.orig shells/pdksh/pkg/DESCR
--- shells/pdksh/pkg/DESCR.orig Fri Jan 21 09:32:41 2000
+++ shells/pdksh/pkg/DESCR      Fri Jan 21 09:32:53 2000
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
 PDKSH is the Public Domain Korn Shell. Its command language is a
 superset of the sh(1) shell language.
+
+WWW: http://www.cs.mun.ca/~michael/pdksh/
